name: Trapped
overview: College first year student, Roshni, falls in love with a DJ, Raaz. His classmate Shyam has feelings for her. Roshni and Raaz would often date as any other youngster would do; One day Roshni finds herself trapped in the clutches of human traffickers. She soon realizes herself to be the victim of someone’s lust.

trailers.title: Trapped | Episode 1 - 'Fall In Love' | A Web Series By Shailesh Kumar
